title: CMS Energy Corporation (CMS) CEO Garrick Rochow on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: CMS Energy Corporation (NYSE:CMS ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 9:30 AM ET Company Participants Sri Maddipati - Treasurer and Vice President, Finance & Investor Relations Garrick Rochow - President & Chief Executive Officer Rejji Hayes - Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Jeremy Tonet - JPMorgan Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Andrew Weisel - Scotiabank David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Ryan Levine - Citi Operator Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the CMS Energy 2022 Second Quarter Results. The earnings news release issued earlier today and the presentation used in this webcast are available on CMS Energy's website in the Investor Relations section.

title: CMS Energy (CMS) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: CMS Energy (CMS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 20.45% and 19.51%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: CMS Energy Announces Strong Second Quarter Results, Reaffirms 2022 Adjusted EPS Guidance
text: JACKSON, Mich. , July 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- CMS Energy announced today reported earnings per share of $0.50 for the second quarter of 2022, compared to $0.61 per share for the same quarter in 2021.

title: The 7 Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now
text: The best utility stocks offer excellent defensive plays in riding out today's volatile markets. The demand for utility services remains relatively insulated from broad market downturns.

title: What's in the Offing for CMS Energy (CMS) in Q2 Earnings?
text: CMS Energy's (CMS) second-quarter results are likely to reflect a positive impact on its sales, buoyed by favorable new connections, load growth and weather conditions.

title: A Transformation by the Numbers: Consumers Energy Provides Over 2,000 Incentives for Electric Vehicle Charging
text: JACKSON, Mich. , July 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy continues to power Michigan's electric vehicle transformation, announcing today that it has provided over 2,000 incentives for EV chargers at homes, businesses and at public locations in less than three years.

title: CMS Energy (CMS) Arm Set to Invest $170M in Natural Gas System
text: CMS Energy's (CMS) subsidiary, Consumers Energy, is set to invest $170 million in natural gas system aims, as part of its plan to invest $1 billion annually to modernize the same

title: CMS Energy to Announce 2022 Second Quarter Results on July 28
text: JACKSON, Mich. , July 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- CMS Energy announced today it will provide 2022 second quarter results along with a business and financial outlook at 9:30 a.m.

title: Consumers Energy Announces Major New Investment in Natural Gas System, Improves Reliability for Customers
text: JACKSON, Mich. , July 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy received approval today on a $170 million investment to modernize Michigan's natural gas system, making it even more safe, clean, reliable and affordable for customers.
